item.title: The Case Of Eric Houston And What He Did In His Highschool
item.description: Emma Kenny discusses the case of Eric Houston and what happened at his high school.

item.title: The Parasite Who Stole a Lifeless Girl's Identity
item.description: Emma Kenny discusses a troubling case involving a stolen identity and the impact on a young girl.

media:content.media:title: The Parasite Who Stole a Lifeless Girl's Identity
media:content.media:description: Emma Kenny discusses a troubling case involving a stolen identity and the impact on a young girl.

item.title: Man Takes the Lives of 6, Not Knowing One Is Still Alive!
item.description: In March 2008, Memphis was shaken by the Lester Street Massacre when Jessie Dotson murdered six relatives, including two young children, inside his brother’s home after a violent argument. Three children survived despite horrific injuries and later identified their uncle as the killer. Dotson tried to stage the scene as a gang-related attack, but investigators uncovered the truth. He was convicted and sentenced to six death penalties, yet still claims he is innocent today. Do you believe justice was truly served in this case?

media:content.media:title: Man Takes the Lives of 6, Not Knowing One Is Still Alive!
media:content.media:description: In March 2008, Memphis was shaken by the Lester Street Massacre when Jessie Dotson murdered six relatives, including two young children, inside his brother’s home after a violent argument. Three children survived despite horrific injuries and later identified their uncle as the killer. Dotson tried to stage the scene as a gang-related attack, but investigators uncovered the truth. He was convicted and sentenced to six death penalties, yet still claims he is innocent today. Do you believe justice was truly served in this case?
